entries.source: "Ask me questions before explaining too much."
entries.value: "Spør meg spørsmål før forklarer too much."

entries.source: "Check my answer before giving yours."
entries.value: "Check mitt svar før å gi ditt."

entries.source: "Check this claim's evidence"
entries.value: "Sjekk bevisene for denne påstanden"

entries.source: "Give me a harder version after I try."
entries.value: "Gi meg en vanskeligere version etter jeg prøver."

entries.source: "Is this article reliable?"
entries.value: "Er denne artikkelen pålitelig?"

entries.source: "Keep it beginner friendly."
entries.value: "Hold det beginner friendly."

entries.source: "Spot bias in this paragraph"
entries.value: "Finn bias i dette avsnittet"

entries.source: "Use examples from my exam, project, or daily life."
entries.value: "Bruk eksempler fra mitt exam, prosjekt, eller hverdagen."

entries.source: AI prompts
entries.value: KI-prompter

entries.source: Ask for a tiny first task.
entries.value: Be om en tiny første oppgave.

entries.source: End with a recap you write yourself.
entries.value: Avslutt med en oppsummering du skriver selv.

entries.source: For Source Critic, a useful practice loop is:
entries.value: For Kildekritiker er en nyttig øvingssløyfe:

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Evaluate articles, claims, videos, or posts for evidence, bias, reliability, and missing context.
entries.value: For denne modusen er jobben enkel: Vurder artikler, påstander, videoer eller innlegg etter bevis, skjevhet, pålitelighet og manglende kontekst.

entries.source: Good prompts usually include three things: the subject, your current level, and the kind of help you want. You do not need perfect wording. You only need enough context for the session to begin.
entries.value: Good prompter usually inkluder tre things: fag, din nåværende nivå, og typen hjelp du ønsker. Du ikke trenger perfect wording. Du bare trenger nok kontekst for økt å begin.

entries.source: If the response feels too broad, narrow it. Ask for one example, one misconception, one check question, or one next step. If it feels too easy, ask for a challenge. If it feels too hard, ask for a bridge from what you already know.
entries.value: If response feels too broad, smal det. Be om ett eksempel, ett misforståelse, ett sjekk spørsmål, eller ett neste steg. If det feels too easy, spør for en challenge. If det feels too hard, spør for en bridge fra hva du allerede know.

entries.source: Make the output more useful
entries.value: Gjør resultatet mer nyttig

entries.source: Prompt ideas and a repeatable study loop for getting useful learning results from Source Critic on inspir.
entries.value: Promptideer og en repeterbar studiesløyfe for å få nyttige læringsresultater fra Kildekritiker på inspir.

entries.source: Reading an AI response is not the same as learning. After the first answer, ask the mode to make you do something with the idea.
entries.value: Lesing en KI response er ikke samme as læring. After første svar, spør modus å lag du do noe med idea.

entries.source: Related learning paths
entries.value: Relaterte læringsstier

entries.source: Request feedback on the part that felt uncertain.
entries.value: Request tilbakemelding on part som felt usikkert.

entries.source: Respond before asking for the solution.
entries.value: Svar før du ber om løsningen.

entries.source: Source Critic prompts and study loop
entries.value: Kildekritiker prompter og studiesløyfe

entries.source: Start with one clear request
entries.value: Start med ett tydelig request

entries.source: State the goal in one sentence.
entries.value: Formuler målet i én setning.

entries.source: study skills
entries.value: studieteknikk

entries.source: That final recap is important. When you explain the idea back, you reveal what is solid and what is still borrowed from the AI.
entries.value: That endelige recap er important. When du forklar idea back, du reveal hva er solid og hva er still borrowed fra KI.

entries.source: The best learning sessions are adjustable. This mode is tuned for source critic with its own prompts, examples, and learning flow.
entries.value: beste læring økter er adjustable. This modus er tilpasset for kilde critic med its own prompter, eksempler, og læring flow.

entries.source: The fastest way to get value from Source Critic is to give the AI a learning job, not just a topic. A topic says what you are interested in. A learning job says what kind of help you need.
entries.value: raskeste måten å få verdi fra Kildekritiker er å gi KI en læringsjobb, ikke bare en tema. En tema sier hva du er interessert i. En læringsjobb sier hva typen hjelp du trenger.

entries.source: Then add a constraint that makes the session more personal:
entries.value: Then add en constraint som makes økt mer personal:

entries.source: Thinking
entries.value: Tenkning

entries.source: Try one of these starters:
entries.value: Prøv en av disse starterne:

entries.source: Turn the mode into practice
entries.value: Gjør modus til øving

entries.source: Use Source Critic when this is the right mode for the job. If you want a related path, try Research Assistant. You can also browse the AI learning blog for study methods, Socratic learning, flashcards, roleplay, and active recall.
entries.value: Bruk Kildekritiker når dette er riktig modus for jobben. Hvis du vil ha en relatert sti, prøv Forskningsassistent. Du kan også utforske KI-læringsbloggen for studiemetoder, sokratisk læring, flashcards, rollespill og aktiv gjenhenting.
